parsed_review.summary: CP00-726 (RP24.P02.M03.S01-RP24.P02.M04.S18, Risk B, 40 units) is a descriptor-only Korean Legal Depth closeout pack that extends the established CP00-722..CP00-725 pattern. Verified directly via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) the 40 units in review-baseline.json hand-count to exactly the declared deliverable_distribution {contract:2,implementation:18,security_audit:4,ui:6,claude_review:2,failure_recovery:4,test:4} and micro_title_distribution {Primary:22,Secondary:18}, matching KOREAN_LEGAL_CP726_REQUIREMENTS; (2) registry.js/service.js/validators.js/index.js add the CP726 binding (next CP00-727 / RP24.P02.M04.S19), requirements, case-set, descriptor, Hermes/Claude packets, handoff, and coverage/descriptor validators consistent with prior packs; (3) model.test.js adds CP00-726 binding+coverage, runtime-closed descriptor (runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-727, all runtime flags false), and contract-latest-projection tests; (4) the regenerated 985KB contract sets current_pack/latest_pack=CP00-726 with CP722..725 historical, and a grep for leak markers (real_client_data/raw_payload/legal_source_payload/external_credential/emits_runtime_receipt/writes_product_state = true) returned zero matches. Boundaries hold: claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, Claude packet read_only=true, Hermes packets emits_runtime_receipt=false (deterministic control-plane only, not product runtime). No over-claim: manifest, construction-inspection, command-evidence, adjudication, and claude-review-result all report production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / status=pending_review, correctly gated on exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review (this receipt). Review-hardening posture is present: forbidden_review_evidence enumerates not_logged_in/malformed_json/usage_limit/tool_call_shaped_output/zero_byte_stdout/fenced_json_with_prose; the readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1446-byte valid JSON, non-zero stdout); no prior invalid/contaminated review attempts exist. Plan live_state and next-pack-queue both pin CP00-726 as latest with next CP00-727, consistent with the registry binding. Claude remains a read-only, non-final reviewer; the human/enterprise-trust approval authority is closed outside this receipt, so it does not block this CP closeout goal. Provenance caveat: the validation-ladder exit codes in command-evidence.json (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check — all 0) are agent-reported; this review is strictly read-only (no Bash) and did not independently re-execute them. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; the pack is internally consistent and supports its descriptor-verified (not production-runtime) closeout claim.
